pkgmetadata.longdescription: Boolean.. image httpstravis-ci.orgsciscoboolean.svgbranchdevelop target httpstravis-ci.orgsciscoboolean.. image httpsbadge.fury.iopyboolean.svg target httpbadge.fury.iopyboolean.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypilboolean.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypiboolean alt LicenseConverts strings such as true, True, y, n, ... to their equivalent Boolean value.Installation------------.. code pip install booleanUsage-----.. code from boolean import boolean boolean(True) True boolean(t) True boolean(f) False boolean(False) False
